title: Economic Impact
text: Sandia National Laboratories has a robust and widespread economic impact. Spending by the Labs exceeds $5.2 billion a year. Over $1.6 billion goes to subcontracts. That includes about $1.03 billion in subcontracts with small businesses. Explore the links below to learn more about the specific ways Sandia is making a difference at our headquarters in New Mexico and our second principal laboratory in California.
